intro: Pyrrosia fallax is a species of plant in the family Polypodiaceae, commonly known as the fallax polypody, a type of epiphytic fern native to Asia. The fallax polypody is valued for its medicinal properties, with reported health benefits including anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant activities, which may help to alleviate symptoms of fever, cough, and respiratory issues.
